code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{TextField,Button,Paper}from"@mui/material";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function StudentForm(_ref){let{addStudent,updateStudent,editingStudent}=_ref;const[student,setStudent]=useState({name:"",email:"",age:""});useEffect(()=>{if(editingStudent){setStudent(editingStudent);}},[editingStudent]);const handleChange=e=>{setStudent({...student,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const validateEmail=email=>/\S+@\S+\.\S+/.test(email);const handleSubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!student.name||!student.email||!student.age){alert("All fields are required");return;}if(!validateEmail(student.email)){alert("Invalid email");return;}if(editingStudent){updateStudent(student);}else{addStudent(student);}setStudent({name:"",email:"",age:""});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Paper,{style:{padding:20,marginBottom:20},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TextField,{label:"Name",name:"name",fullWidth:true,margin:"normal",value:student.name,onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TextField,{label:"Email",name:"email",fullWidth:true,margin:"normal",value:student.email,onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TextField,{label:"Age",name:"age",fullWidth:true,margin:"normal",value:student.age,onChange:handleChange}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{type:"submit",variant:"contained",children:editingStudent?"Update Student":"Add Student"})]})});}export default StudentForm;
